rules.expected: Identify Dropbear/dropbearmulti component banners. Do not report API misuse without concrete symbol-level internal API evidence.
rules.evidence_summary: Dropbear is normally shipped as SSH server/client applications in firmware rather than as a public C API.

rules.expected: Potential internal allocation/free rules require build-specific symbol evidence; keep as manual RAG context only.
rules.evidence_summary: Dropbear internals are often statically linked/stripped in firmware, so generic API misuse rules have high false-positive risk.
